title: Create revenue-generating marketplace platform

requirements.text: Create a marketplace platform that connects buyers and sellers with transaction capabilities

quotes: Make me a Website/ App that can bring me 100000 in

acceptanceCriteria: Sellers can create and manage listings with pricing

requirements.text: Implement user authentication system using Internet Identity for secure access
acceptanceCriteria: Users can sign up and log in using Internet Identity
User sessions persist across page refreshes

requirements.text: Build a product listing system where sellers can create listings with title, description, price, and category
acceptanceCriteria: Sellers can create new listings with all required fields
Listings are stored persistently in the backend
Listings can be edited and deleted by their creators

requirements.text: Implement a payment processing system that handles transactions between buyers and sellers with platform commission tracking
acceptanceCriteria: Platform calculates and tracks commission on each sale
Transaction history is maintained for users

requirements.text: Create a revenue dashboard showing total platform earnings, transaction volume, and growth metrics
acceptanceCriteria: Shows number of transactions and active users
Includes visual charts for revenue trends

requirements.text: Design a modern, professional interface using a sophisticated dark theme with gold and emerald green accents that conveys trust and premium value
acceptanceCriteria: Visual design uses consistent dark background with gold/emerald accent colors
Typography hierarchy is clear and professional
Interface elements feel polished and trustworthy

constraints: Use Internet Identity for authentication (no third-party auth services)
All backend logic must be implemented in the single main Motoko actor
Payment processing must be handled within the Internet Computer ecosystem
nonGoals: Integration with external payment providers like PayPal or Stripe
Real-time chat between buyers and sellers

required: Professional marketplace hero banner with abstract financial growth imagery in dark theme with gold accents (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Minimalist currency or transaction icon for dashboard (transaction-icon.dim_128x128.png)
